headlines.headline: Jovor Networks files routine patent applications in renewable storage

sentiment.reasoning: Filing routine patent applications indicates ongoing R&D and intellectual property development, which is generally positive for a tech company but has no immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
